title: Trump Says He Wants AI Guardrails, But ‘As Little as Possible’
description: President Donald Trump said he sees the need for some standards on artificial intelligence technology, but wants to avoid burdensome restrictions that may hamper American companies competing with China.

title: Treasuries Gain on Fed Rate-Hike Bets | The Close 7/2/2026
description: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are MSIM CIO, Portfolio Solutions Group Jim Caron, Roth Capital Senior Research Analyst Craig Irwin, CUNY Graduate Center Research Professor, Economics Paul Krugman, Securitize Co-Founder & CEO Carlos Domingo, Envestnet Co-Chief Investment Officer & Group President Dana D’Auria, Blueprint Capital Advisors CEO Jacob Walthour Jr., Vanguard Senior Fixed Income Client Portfolio Manager Rebecca Venter, Cambria Investment Founder & CIO Meb Faber, & Stew Leonard’s President & CEO Stew Leonard Jr. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Uncertainty Grows as Stocks Retrace Gains Following Jobs Report
description: Jim Caron, CIO of the Portfolio Solutions Group at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses the current state of the stock market heading into the second half of the year. Despite significant gains earlier in the year, Caron addresses whether investors should remain overweight in equities amid recent volatility. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Bailey Lipschultz on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)
